## Area

Which part needs documentation?

- [ ] README
- [ ] GitHub Pages
- [ ] Demo Gallery
- [ ] Project Map
- [ ] Project Status
- [ ] Prototype docs
- [ ] Tool docs
- [ ] Release notes

## Problem

What is unclear or missing?

## Proposed improvement

What should be added or changed?

## Done when

- [ ] The documentation is clear from a cold visitor perspective
- [ ] Links are working
- [ ] No private/local data is exposed
